queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Moonlight Game Streaming Client' AND publisher = 'Moonlight Game Streaming Project';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Moonlight Game Streaming Client' AND publisher = 'Moonlight Game Streaming Project' AND version_compare(version, '6.1.0.0') < 0);
